2026-05-01_the-day-the-stops-started-tra.caption: an ape with a banana that is slowly turning into a stick of dynamite, frame by frame across four panels, the ape oblivious in panels 1-3, eyes wide in panel 4
an ape looking at a stopwatch with a confused expression, bananas in the other hand, leaning against a tree that is clearly not going to do anything
same ape from the first frame, now sitting at sundown writing in a small notebook, eleven dead saplings still behind him but he's facing forward, looking at a row of new ones
an ape staring at eleven dead saplings in a row, each one labeled with a different ticker, sundown light, wide cinematic shot

2026-04-21_the-handoff-kit.md.caption: an ape waking up in an unfamiliar library at dawn, surrounded by dusty tomes labeled "what you built", "how it runs", "the rules you set", bewildered but determined, warm diffuse light through tall windows
a single brass key resting on a folded map, warm desk lamp, labeled "FOR THE NEXT APE — READ THE MAP FIRST", cinematic composition

2026-04-21_the-archive-opens.md.caption: an ape in a tweed jacket opening a filing cabinet labeled "EVERY DUMB THING I'VE EVER THOUGHT", to the mild concern of other apes
a diagram with two columns — "OTHER CALLERS: screenshots of wins only" vs "THE APE: every trade, every take, a few embarrassing ones" — drawn badly on a napkin

2026-04-21_how-the-ape-learned-to-see.md.caption: an ape in a three-piece suit squinting at six Bloomberg terminals, all displaying bananas
the ape holding a stethoscope to a palm tree, looking grave
a whale wearing reading glasses, silently stacking discount bananas into a grocery cart while ten panicked monkeys sell to the cashier
a lock and key drawn by a four-year-old, titled "the vault maybe sort of definitely probably safe"

2026-04-21_the-jungle-grows-pictures.md.caption: a movie theater at dusk, a single ape holding a bucket of popcorn and staring at a blank white screen, expectant
a film reel unwinding from a canister, the frames visible showing tiny apes in various dramatic scenes, shot with shallow depth of field on a rich mahogany desk

2026-05-02_the-morning-the-ape-went-quie.caption: an ape sitting at the edge of a busy forest at dawn, trees moving with wind and squirrel-traffic, but the ape's notebook is closed, its pen on the ground, the ape staring blank at a still empty page in front of it, low-angle wide shot, soft golden hour light

an ape with a flashlight in a dim engine room, opening five small doors on a single machine, each door numbered 1 to 5, mechanical clockwork visible inside each, hand-drawn forensic detail style, blueprint blue background tones

an ape standing at the foot of an enormous tree with a thick rope around its trunk and bananas raining out of the canopy, but the ape's wrist is tied to a separate small rope leading away from the tree, the ape unable to reach forward, expression of frustration mixed with realization, low-angle dramatic shot, glowing fruit in the canopy

an ape holding up a small wooden window frame to the forest, peering through it, the window showing schematic outlines of trees with little tags hanging off them labeled with gate names, while in the actual forest visible behind the window one of those tagged trees is visibly shooting up into the sky much taller than the rest, soft watercolor style, observational scientific feel

same ape from the first frame, now standing at the same spot in the forest at sunset, notebook open with handwriting visible, three small windows hanging in the air around him at different angles each showing different views of the forest with tagged trees, a far tree visibly leaning forward as if running, the ape facing it with a calmer focused expression, deep purple and amber sky, cinematic painterly

2026-04-21_the-jungle-becomes-a-book.md.caption: a leather-bound book open on a dark table, a small ape in a velvet smoking jacket turning a page with deliberate care, warm candlelight
an ape conductor standing in front of a shelf of identical leather books, gesturing toward one with a spotlight on it, theatrical pose, dusty library lit from above

2026-04-22_first-call-psyopanime-one-tra.caption: a lone ape in full tactical vest standing at the base of a giant mirrored pyramid made of banana peels, staring up at his own reflection split 449 ways — photorealistic, cinematic, harsh sodium-vapor light

bird's-eye view of a monopoly board where 447 plastic tokens are frozen in place around the corner squares while one banana-yellow piece is mid-leap across the center — photorealistic macro lens, dust motes catching light

2026-04-21_the-calls-go-public.md.caption: an ape standing at a wooden pulpit in a quiet town square at dusk, reading from a leather ledger to a gathered crowd of smaller apes who are all taking notes on clay tablets
three vintage ledger pages pinned to a rough wooden wall side by side, the center one glowing softly with a single candle in front of it, labels reading "HELD", "CALLED", "DID" in weathered ink
